Option C: "Lightning travels 5 times faster than thunder." The passage mentions that the light of lightning reaches eyes almost instantly, but sound takes about 5 seconds to travel one mile. So the speed of light is much faster than the speed of sound. The speed of light is about 186,282 miles per second, while the speed of sound is about 0.2 miles per second.
